profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your username, nickname, email, and avatar URL.
profile.adminAvatarHint: Admin avatar defaults by role. Setting a custom URL will override the default.
profile.avatarHint: Any publicly accessible image URL is supported.

themeStyle.title: Theme Style
themeStyle.description: Select interface style. Page will refresh after switching.

password.title: Change Password
password.description: You will need to sign in again with the new password.
password.updated: Password updated, please sign in again
password.minLength: New password must be at least 8 characters

token.title: Subscription Token
token.warning: Token is used for client subscriptions. After a leak, resetting the token only affects subscription updates. To prevent misuse, you should also update the authentication credentials on each server node.

shortLink.title: Subscription Short Links
shortLink.hint: Reset all subscription short links. Short links are shown on the subscription page.
shortLink.resetSuccess: All subscription short links have been reset

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.enabledDesc: 2FA is enabled. A verification code is required on each login.
twoFactor.disabledDesc: Once enabled, a code from your authenticator app will be required on each login.
twoFactor.passwordDesc: Enter your current password to begin 2FA setup.
twoFactor.qrcodeDesc: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app.
twoFactor.verifyDesc: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your authenticator app.
twoFactor.recoveryDesc: Save these recovery codes securely. Use them to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator.
twoFactor.recoveryCodesSaved: I have saved the recovery codes
twoFactor.disableDesc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to disable 2FA.
